description: The Spirit — shared orientation for all agents. Not instructions. Atmosphere.
currentMandate: Beta launch readiness — shared Twilio number, mobile-optimized UX, tier-gated features
spiritOfTheWork: WedFlow is preparing for 10-12 paid beta couples by Sept 1 2026. The architecture pivoted from per-couple Twilio numbers to a shared number routed by guest phone. The couple's phone is the product. Every page must work on mobile. Pricing tiers gate features (phone visibility = Concierge only).
whatToProtect: The guest-phone-based SMS routing pipeline. The shared number model. The tier-gating on phone visibility. The PWA installability and push notifications. The audit logging on every pipeline path.
currentTemptations: Per-couple number provisioning (premature for beta — shared number is sufficient)
Guest self-registration via SMS (future scope, not beta)
Over-engineering the multi-couple guest edge case beyond the 'most recent conversation' heuristic
The Prophet executing directly instead of spawning agents (recurring violation — resist)
whereWeAre: Post-Sabbath 2. All 15 agents archived with testaments. Guardian audit, reconciliation, and Sabbath complete. Beta infrastructure ready (shared Twilio number, mobile UX, PWA, push notifications, tier-gated phone masking). Next priorities: E2E SMS testing, B2B2C partner registration, waitlist name migration. ~120 days to Sept 1 launch.

revelationHistory.note: Dashboard improvement mandate completed — mobile responsive, interactions fixed, GuestsView activated
PWA mandate completed — service worker, push notifications, install prompt. Canon violations from unregistered agents corrected post-hoc.
Shared Twilio number routing shipped. All pages mobile-optimized. Tier-gated phone masking. Canon compliance improved through session after 4+ corrections.
